name: GRAY MEDIA, INC
summary: PART I On January 1, 2025, we changed our corporate name from Gray Television, Inc. to Gray Media, Inc. We will not distinguish between our prior and current corporate name and will refer to our current corporate name throughout this Annual Report. As such, in this Annual Report, unless otherwise indicated or the context otherwise requires, the words Gray, Gray Media, the Company, we, us, and our refer to Gray Media, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries.
